description_long: This is a modern smartphone with a rectangular form factor, featuring a large touchscreen display on the front with minimal bezels and three capacitive navigation buttons at the bottom. The back panel is a matte reddish-pink color, displaying a silver logo in the center and the word 'selfix' near the bottom, with a single camera lens and flash located at the top left corner. The sides of the phone are slim and show a set of physical buttons, likely for volume and power, on the left edge. The device appears to be constructed primarily from plastic with a glass front, and the overall design is sleek and contemporary. The screen is active, displaying a colorful abstract wallpaper with a large 'X' and some interface icons. The phone is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large touchscreen, matte reddish-pink back, and a single rear camera. The front display is active, showing a vibrant wallpaper and navigation icons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with a colorful wallpaper, navigation icons, and a front-facing camera at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the slim profile and three physical buttons, likely for volume and power control.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte reddish-pink panel, a silver logo in the center, 'selfix' branding at the bottom, and a single camera with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim edge with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver logo is centered on the back panel, above the word 'selfix'. The logo consists of a stylized 'S' or abstract mark.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with a large white 'X' in the center, a lock icon, and navigation icons at the bottom. The status bar shows a signal indicator and battery icon.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens is located at the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a flash module to its right. There is also a small front-facing camera above the display.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons are visible on the left edge, likely for volume up, volume down, and power. Three capacitive navigation buttons are present below the screen on the front.
